title: SystemUpdate
description: System metrics payload. Sent every 1-2 s. First message is a full snapshot; subsequent messages are deltas (only changed fields present).

cpu_temp_c.description: CPU temperature in Celsius; null if not available

ram_used_mb.description: RAM currently in use, in mebibytes

swap_used_mb.description: Swap space currently in use, in mebibytes

net_up_bps.description: Network upload throughput in bytes per second

net_down_bps.description: Network download throughput in bytes per second

disk_read_bps.description: Disk read throughput in bytes per second

disk_write_bps.description: Disk write throughput in bytes per second

battery_percent.description: Battery charge percentage; null if no battery present

battery_charging.description: Whether the battery is currently charging; null if no battery present
